summary: Manual carrier-only closeout review approved PR #160 current pointer retire content head eb9e18330cd0d5365bd59ee76d520e3d35f0e12a. This review covers only retiring the GH-101 current pointer to no_active_item / idle after PR #136 merged; it does not approve new product behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: Post-merge closeout consumed implementation PR #129 (https://github.com/WebEnvoy/App/pull/129), PR head `5e720b85b30dc262ad33bb07b24f3a27883f8f1e`, squash merge commit `b8064281695d4ba13a25a97fdfc8173b31e65fd5`, target branch `main`, hosted run https://github.com/WebEnvoy/App/actions/runs/28639874616, and issue closeout evidence for #101, #102, #103, #104, and #93. Pre-merge validation passed `npm run typecheck`, `npm run smoke`, `npm audit --audit-level=high`, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-101 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-101 --json`, and PR metadata preflight. Hosted `py-compile`, `demo-bootstrap`, `repo-local-cli`, `loom-check`, and `loom-pr-merge-gate` passed on run `28639874616`. `loom build` and `loom review record` remained blocked by Loom suite CLI JSON consumption; no repo-local Loom shim was added.
follow_ups: #105-#109 remain for the #94 Core task path / read-only run view batch; GH-101 does not complete #94.
#110-#113 remain for the #95 evidence, package source, and execution-site reference batch; GH-101 does not complete #95.
Fix the Loom review-record / suite CLI JSON consumption surface outside this App closeout PR so authored review records can be created by the tool again.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The underlying GH-101 implementation and closeout carrier were already merged in PR #129 and PR #136. PR #160 changes only the current pointer idle carrier and does not add product/UI/docs behavior.

carrier_only_closeout_review.reason: Authored closeout review approved only terminal GH-101 current-pointer retire metadata consumption for PR #160; it does not approve product implementation behavior.

consumed_inputs.closeout_scope: PR #160 only retires the GH-101 current pointer to no_active_item / idle and keeps #94, #95, and #105-#113 incomplete.
consumed_inputs.validation: git diff --check; jq empty .loom/bootstrap/init-result.json; loom fact-chain --target . --json; loom doctor --target . --json; loom verify --target . --json; loom suite validate --target . --item GH-101 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-101 --json; loom pr metadata-preflight --surface closeout
consumed_inputs.known_tool_blocker: loom build / review record suite CLI JSON consumption blocked; no repo-local tools/loom.py added
